feed.title: SAP Community - Certification
feed.subtitle: Certification blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: New Training Portfolio for Group Reporting
entry.content:
The Group Reporting training portfolio for SAP S/4HANA has been rebuilt and is now natively designed for self-paced learning but also available as classroom training. This is an important step in producing digital content for Finance in line with the latest course design principles, as already outlined in my previous blog ‘New Trainings to Achieve Business Process Skills for SAP S/4HANA’.

All learners from SAP customers and partners and who want to achieve skills on SAP Group Reporting are recommended to use the following learning journeys:

  • Introducing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for group reporting (foundational level / business user)

  • Performing Consolidation with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting (intermediate level / business user and consultant)

  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for group reporting (intermediate level / business user and consultant)


A fourth learning journey will focus on Consolidation of Investments and is currently in production. The four new learning journeys will replace the traditional course portfolio (S4F94, S4F95, S4F96). As a result, the associate certification for SAP Group Reporting will be discontinued.

While foundational learning journeys focus on business process skills and mainly address business users, intermediate level learning journeys also include configuration knowledge and are therefore targeted at both, business users and consultants.

All learning journeys include a summary of all related delivery formats:

  • A Record of Achievement is available for all foundational and intermediate learning journeys and will be issued to a learner once a significant part of all questions included at the end of each chapter are answered correctly.

  • Some learning journeys offer the opportunity to book a system for Hands-on Practice. Learners are encouraged to use exercises provided, which are considered valuable practice regardless of whether they plan to implement SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting or SAP S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting (the on-premise or private cloud system environment). Access to training systems requires a valid subscription to SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or solution edition for Finance and a booking of the respective Learning System access.

  • The SAP Learning Class part takes you to related classroom offering and all scheduled classroom events.


The links to all relevant and future learning journeys for SAP Group Reporting are summarized on the following landing pages:

  • Landing page for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Financial Management

  • Landing Page for SAP S/4HANA, Financial Consolidation


The classic SAP Group Reporting learning journey on help.sap.com and SAP Learning Hub has been adjusted so that the new recommended learning paths are reflected accordingly.

Our next step will be to produce the next and the last Group Reporting learning journey.

Please watch out for further announcements!

Best regards, Doris Lindauer

entry.title: Release Announcement: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Customer Data Cloud
entry.content:
On behalf of the SAP CRM & CX Product Learning CoE team, I am pleased to announce the official release of the SAP Customer Data Cloud certification:

  • C_C4H620_34 – SAP Certified Development Associate – SAP Customer Data Cloud




Target Audience 

  • Business End Users

  • Technical Consultants

  • Functional Consultants

  • Solution Architects


 

 Description


The "SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Customer Data Cloud" certification exam validates that the candidate possesses the fundamental and core knowledge required for the development consultant profile. This certification proves that the candidate has an overall understanding and in‐depth technical skills to participate as a member of an SAP Customer Data Cloud project team in a mentored role. This certification exam is recommended as an entry-level qualification.

 















Bookings: Visit the training shop to read the full description of both the course and certification and book your training.
Enablement Videos: New SAP Customer Data Cloud videos are regularly added on microlearning.opensap.com
Learning Journey: Check for other learning offerings to complete your SAP Customer Data Cloud learning journey

If you have any questions related to SAP Customer Data Cloud, check here for questions asked by other community members or to ask new questions.

If you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to add a comment.

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud Version 2 - SAP Certification
entry.content:
"You don’t have to be the smartest person in the room; you just have to be the most committed to learning." - Jeff Bezos

Do you want to learn more about the latest buzz “SAP Service Cloud V2 Certification"? You are at the right spot to get all the information you need in one place.

Introduction to Service Cloud V2


The SAP Service Cloud V2 built using Cloud Native Stack assists you in optimizing customer lifetime value by connecting positive experiences to solutions that are significant to customers.

It includes various key concepts, such as:

  • Case management offers guided phases to streamline the agent's case processing and, in the end, expedite the resolution process while enhancing accountability.

  • Enhanced Agent Desktop

  • Email2Case scenario where case would be created for all incoming email interactions configured for a particular email channel.

  • Autoflows to send automated emails, to create notifications, etc.,


Certification ID


You can check the Certification details for SAP Service Cloud Version 2 here - C_C4H56I_34 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Service Cloud Version 2

Sample Badge



SAP Service Cloud V2 Sample Badge



Topic Areas & Weightage


















































Topic Areas Items Weightage
Master Data Set up master data regarding Account, Contact, Product, Organization, and employees. 11% - 20%
Cases Configuration Document Types, Party Role, Status Schema and Business Flows 11% - 20%
Communication Channels Configuration the Agent Desktop for CTI and Interaction Center Processes. Configuration of the communication channel E-Mail to manage E-Mail Inbound scenarios including configuration Response Templates for Outbound scenarios 11% - 20%
Personalization and Extensibility Manage the Personalization, Extension fields, Validations and Determinations 11% - 20%
Service Elements Configuration SLA, Categories and Case Routing 11% - 20%
Basic Setup Enable the system through Activation of Services to be able to make the system SSC V2.0 ready for implementation <=10%
User Management Manage the creation of User and business roles including authorization <=10%
Service Objects Set up the service objects Registered Products, Installed Base and Warranty <=10%

Note: Always refer to the training portal to get the current details on topic areas and weightage since SAP reserves the right to update the exam content (topics, items, weighting) at any time.

Learning Journey


Learning Journey covers all the objectives mentioned about to learn and experience about SAP Service Cloud Version 2. It includes 9 units explaining about the implementation to setting master data and other admin configs.

You can check the learning journey course content here.

My Key Takeaways



  • First and foremost, being able to comprehend the concepts was greatly aided by my hands-on experience with SAP Service Cloud Version 2.

  • If you haven't had the opportunity to work with a live tenant, the learning journey offers guided hands-on exercises that will assist you gain understanding of the key concepts.

  • Since each unit covers specific objective, carries weightage, and provides guided hands-on experiences, it helps to cover all 9 units for the certification.

  • Attend all the quizzes at the end of each unit which helps to assess the knowledge gained from each unit.

  • You can also find few sample questions here.


Reference links


You can check the help portal to get latest information about SAP Service Cloud Version 2.

 

Good Luck for your preparation. Learning experience differs from person to person and I’m all ears to know about your journey as well. Please share your thoughts/ experiences in the comment below.

Thank you!

entry.title: Boost Your Career: Get Certified as CAP Backend Developer
entry.content:
No matter whether you have been part of the SAP community for some time or your career is just about to kick off, you should consider becoming SAP certified. SAP certifications help you not only to gain knowledge on the newest technology and products, they also validate that you are a skilled professional and send a signal to potential customers that you can be trusted when it comes to SAP implementation.

SAP decided to transform its certification program by shifting to role-based certifications. This means that instead of checking the knowledge of a one single product or technology, the certification exam rather validates the skills needed for a certain job role. With that a certification will help you to get exactly the skills you need for your designated tasks and responsibilities by providing you with a tailored learning path.

This transition has started in 2023. The first role-based certification was targeted at enterprise architects. After that, SAP has announced the role-based certification for backend developer with ABAP cloud, which I have described in my previous blog post. In December 2023, the next role-based certification for backend developers working with SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) has been launched. In this blog post, I want to describe the exam topics and explain what skills are covered. Some major changes have been associated with the launch of this role-based certification, such as retirements. I want to address these as well.


Exam page


Let’s start with SAP’s definition of a backend developer – CAP. In a nutshell, backend developers working with CAP play a key role in extending and customizing SAP solutions to meet specific business needs. This role involves leveraging SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to design and implement extension applications to existing SAP applications like SAP S/4HANA Cloud using the side-by-side extensibility concept on SAP BTP. Backend developers can use CAP with Node.js/JavaScript or CAP with Java as well as Core Data Services (CDS) for building cloud-native extensions and Fiori Elements to create UIs. To develop clean and secure cloud extensions on SAP BTP or custom CAP applications, backend developers need to know different tools and methods, for example, Business Application Studio or SAP Cloud SDK. They also have to know how and where CAP applications can be deployed. On SAP BTP, it can be the Cloud Foundry runtime, which is the most popular one, or it can be Kyma, which provides a Kubernetes-based application runtime. Last but not least: We expect backend developers to be familiar with SAP’s low-code/now-code offering – SAP Build, especially SAP Build Process Automation to build powerful workflows and automate tasks.

All the topics I have described have been covered in several different SAP certifications. This is what we call “product-based” certifications that focus on one single product or technology. Since we want to prepare learners for a role of a backend developer working with CAP, support them in obtaining a holistic, future-proof, and more sustainable skillset, and provide them with a clear learning path, we have decided to combine the topics in one single certification exam!

The role-based certification for backend developers – CAP is based on the newest version of the C_CPE exam that has been reworked and enhanced. It now comprises the following topics:


Exam topics


To prepare for the role-based certification, you need to complete the following learning journeys:

  • Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP

  • Develop Advanced Extensions with SAP Cloud SDK

  • Deliver Side-by-Side Extensibility based on SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime

  • Develop Full-Stack Applications Using Productivity Tools in SAP Business Application Studio

  • Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation


These learning journeys are self-paced and free of charge. You will find them on the SAP Learning Site.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The various product-based certification exams are soon to be retired (March 28th 2024):

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Cloud SDK Extensibility Developer (C_S4CDK)

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0 (C_HCDEV)

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS06 (C_HANADEV)

  • SAP Certified Citizen Developer Associate - SAP Build Low-code/No-code Applications and Automations (C_LCNC)

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - Side-by-Side Extensibility based on SAP BTP, Kyma runtime (C_KYMD)

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - Low-code applications based on SAP Business Application Studio (C_BASD)


For all retirement-related question, please refer to this FAQ.

If you were about to take one these exams and you are a backend developer working with CAP, I would recommend that you take a look at the new role-based certification.

If you are a developer but working rather on the frontend side with different SAP UI technologies, or you are more focused on standardized integrations, don’t be worried! There are more role-based certifications to come this year. So stay tuned!

entry.title: Nuestro socio certificado Avvale comenta su larga y amplia trayectoria en el programa de certificación de SAP y el beneficio para clientes
entry.content:
Obtenga más información sobre la trayectoria de Avvale, nuestro socio certificado por SAP desde hace muchos años especializado en servicios para la operación de todo tipo de sistemas SAP. Entre otros servicios, combinan la operación de SAP BTP con la metodología DevOps. También consideran el programa de certificación SAP como una medida orientada al cliente para garantizar la calidad de los servicios ofrecidos.

Por favor comience describiendo su empresa y los servicios que ofrece.

En Avvale estamos enfocados en apoyar a las empresas en obtener el mejor crecimiento sostenible a través de la economía circular y la innovación en los procesos de negocio.

Dentro de nuestro catálogo de servicios, tenemos varios servicios focalizados en tecnología SAP.  De hecho, nuestro origen como compañía fue la excelencia en la implementación de tecnología SAP y servicios relacionados con la operación de entornos SAP.

¿Por qué decidieron inicialmente (en 2008) obtener una certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner?

En 2008, cuando nos llamábamos Realtech, antes del cambio de nombre a Techedge y nuestro actual nombre Avvale, apenas había partners de SAP especializados en tecnología y menos aún que diesen servicios de operación de sistemas en nubes privadas.  Siendo de los primeros, encontramos en el programa de certificación de Outsourcing Operations la mejor herramienta para poder garantizar la calidad del servicio a nuestros clientes.  Es la forma en la que los clientes puedan tener la garantía de SAP sobre la operación que un tercero hace de sus sistemas y las infraestructuras que los soportan.

Desde la primera certificación han expandido el alcance de las certificaciones, es decir no solo han ido recertificando la certificación inicial, sino que han añadido certificaciones adicionales. En 2022 Avvale se certificó por primera vez en certificaciones de operación funcional, es decir no de operación técnica. ¿Cuál fue la razón?

Con la propia evolución de nuestra compañía, y el desarrollo de nuevas líneas de negocio, siempre hemos buscado la manera de poder garantizar la calidad de nuestros servicios a nuestros clientes, de diferenciarnos de la competencia y de servicios no especializados en sistemas tan complejos como sistemas SAP.  Nos especializamos en operar todo tipo de sistemas SAP, no cualquier sistema generalista.  Por eso consideramos el programa de certificación de servicios de Outsourcing de SAP una pieza clave para garantizar la calidad a nuestros clientes.  Ampliar nuestras certificaciones iniciales en infraestructuras, que luego extendimos a operación de SAP HANA, hasta llegar a la operación de los escenarios funcionales tanto de Business Suite como de S/4HANA, ha sido la forma de demostrar nuestra capacidad a los clientes.  No les pedimos que crean que somos buenos en nuestros servicios, es SAP quien lo avala.  Por eso obtenemos niveles “Advanced” en nuestras certificaciones y lo hacemos con nuestros equipos locales en España.

Recientemente obtuvieron la certificación de SAP BTP Operations. ¿Cuál fue el factor decisivo para optar a esta certificación? ¿Qué beneficios asocian con la certificación de SAP BTP Operations?

En Avvale hacemos proyectos de innovación para permitir a las empresas adaptar sus procesos de forma rápida a sus necesidades y mejorar su eficiencia, su sostenibilidad, su mejor aprovechamiento de economía circular y su mayor beneficio.  Para conseguirlo es necesaria una plataforma tecnológica que soporte todo esto.  Como especialistas en tecnología SAP, utilizamos la plataforma de SAP BTP en todos sus aspectos, integrándola con otras tecnologías como ChatGPT y otros tipos de IA.  Una vez más, creemos que la mejor forma de garantizar a nuestros clientes no sólo la capacidad de ejecución, si no también la calidad, es mediante la obtención de esta certificación, que muy pocos en España han obtenido todavía.

Avvale se ha preparado por primera vez para la certificación DevOps. ¿Cuál fue la motivación para elegir esta certificación?

Realmente ya hemos avanzado en el proceso hasta el punto de haber superado la auditoría con éxito y en espera de la certificación oficial formal.  Con esto, seremos el primer Partner de SAP en España con la combinación de SAP BTP y DevOps, que sin duda tienen que ir de la mano.  Es imposible realizar buenas implementaciones ligadas a una buena operación de SAP BTP sin el uso de la metodología DevOps.  Por eso pensamos que únicamente la certificación en SAP BTP no es suficiente para demostrar a nuestros clientes la calidad necesaria.

Además, la certificación de SAP DevOps, no aplica únicamente a BTP, si no que realmente DevOps, como metodología se puede aplicar a cualquier escenario en el que se aproveche la ventaja de unificar la experiencia de la operación para enriquecer los procesos mediante el desarrollo en la línea correcta.

¿En qué medida apoyan las certificaciones sus actividades de marketing y su comunicación con clientes?

Para nosotros las certificaciones de SAP son fundamentales en nuestras campañas de marketing, así como en la comunicación con los clientes para facilitarles escoger con garantía de calidad.  Siempre invitamos a nuestros clientes que verifiquen con SAP, no sólo que se cuente con la certificación, si no que la misma haya sido obtenida de forma local, por los propios equipos que van a acompañarlos en sus proyectos.

¿Qué beneficios ven en las certificaciones de SAP? Las recomendaciones durante la auditoría, el valor para las actividades de marketing, …

Para nosotros cada auditoría no es mero trámite para obtener un sello, con nuestro nivel de madurez podríamos obtenerlos.  Lo que queremos es seguir avanzando, ir más allá, sobrepasar… (de ahí nuestro nombre Avvale…) y el reporte final de la auditoría siempre nos ayuda con las recomendaciones a trazar líneas de mejora.  A lo largo de los años, echando la vista atrás a los inicios de nuestros procesos de certificación, todas las recomendaciones nos sirvieron para mejorar rápidamente y poder llegar a niveles de calidad que, de otra manera, habríamos tardado más tiempo en alcanzar.  Incluso, en algunos casos, hemos tenido recomendaciones a integrantes de nuestra cadena de suministro, que han podido aplicar mejorando sus procesos y capacidades, aportándonos mayor valor a nosotros y por tanto a nuestros clientes.

entry.title: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant and Boost Your Career

 As businesses move to the cloud, 91 percent of companies use an ERP as a central element of their application landscape – and most of them turn to SAP’s SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution. However, choosing the right software is not the only key to success. To stay ahead of the curve and secure business success, organizations seek the help of skilled SAP consultants whose expertise is vital to help organizations leverage the full capabilities of SAP’s cloud-native ERP.

And this is where you come in. To support you in getting ready for your next career step, and to help you acquire the future-focused skills you need to help organizations drive success in the cloud, SAP just launched a new role-based certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants. If you are looking for future-focused learning resources that perfectly align with your consulting role and responsibilities, help you acquire a sustainable skill set, and get you certified to prove your expertise, this is for you!

To get you started, here are 3 things you need to know about the new role-based certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants:

The certification is tailored to your consulting role and responsibilities.

The corresponding learning journeys help you in strengthening the core skills and the must-knows a consultant requires to implement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This includes for example a cloud mindset, SAP Fit-to-standard processes, SAP Central Business Configuration, SAP Activate implementation methodology and SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Management (ALM), extension methods, SAP’s cloud integration technologies, SAP’s clean core strategy, SAP Fiori UX and other innovations, as well as data migration and integration testing.

You can choose between 4 different role-based certifications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants.

To ensure that our partners and customers have the latest skills, we are introducing a new role-based certifications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that can be achieved to demonstrate expertise:

  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” (C_S4CPB_2402)

This certification is designed for all learners who want to validate their core implementation skills and those currently certified in one of the retired SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related certifications.

We do believe that line of business/industry-specific knowledge is relevant. This is why we offer skill validation opportunities for multiple lines of business. For learners interested in financial accounting, sales, and sourcing and procurement, we offer the following certifications, combining both SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation knowledge and core business process knowledge:

  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting” (C_S4CFI_2402)
  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement” (C_S4CPR_2402)
  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales” (C_S4CS_2402)

For learners interested in manufacturing, asset management, professional services, warehouse, supply chain, and service, we offer an intermediate level record of achievement as an addition to the “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” (C_S4CPB_2402) certification to demonstrate their skills in their specific area of expertise. The records of achievement can be achieved by completing the respective learning journeys on SAP Learning site.

The role-based certification can help you achieve your next career goal.

SAP is transitioning to a role-based certification program, and this can make it easier for you to find the perfect certification and learning resources for your next career step as role-based certifications get you exactly the input you need for your designated tasks and responsibilities. They help you streamline your certification journey by concentrating on the areas directly applicable to your consulting expertise and as SAP S/4HANA Cloud evolves, your role-based certification keeps you abreast of the latest features, enhancements, and client demands, making your skills more sustainable and adaptable.

Are you still unsure where to start? Don’t worry, it’s as easy as 1,2,3:

  1. Identify Your consulting role: Choose the certification or record of achievement that best aligns with your consulting role and line of business.
  2. Learn new skills and stay up to date with the latest innovations with SAP’s self-paced learning journeys on the SAP Learning site.
  3. Get certified and validate your expertise by taking the certification exam or quizzes, highlighting your mastery in your specific consulting domain.

Are you already certified in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related certification? Learn how to transition to the new certification program and visit the FAQ on SAP Learning site to get your questions answered.

entry.title: Unlocking Success with SAP: Syed's Inspiring Journey to DemoJam Triumph
entry.content:
Syed couldn't imagine what it would feel like to be on a big stage. He couldn’t image the wild clapping and shouting coming from a crowded room of tech enthusiasts. He couldn't imagine the feeling he would have in his stomach when the six important minutes began – his team’s six important minutes. “I just thought, how can I be so lucky?” Syed was thrilled. He was driven by the excitement of the room – and his own. 

Syed used the SAP Learning site to quickly gain new skills.“It was my first time in a competition”, the 30-year-old from Bangalore recounts. With his colleague Navin, Syed presented their innovative solution addressing a supply chain problem in India: the issue of counterfeit drugs. And they did it on stage the SAP TechEd DemoJam in 2023. Six teams were given six minutes each to present their solution to a problem – live in front of hundreds of people. No mock-ups were allowed, their demo had to be flawless. “My mentor Chandramohan Sankaran, alongside my colleagues such as Kesavan and Vipin, actively contributed to my DemoJam journey. Their diligent efforts and valuable feedback significantly elevated our demo story, pushing it to new heights.” And they secured the first place in the competition.  

Newfound knowledge helped clinch the victory 

However, it didn’t come along that easy, the Senior Product Specialist at SAP Labs Bangalore explains. With only 15 to 20 days to prepare the demo, the duo turned to the SAP Learning site to quickly gain expertise in technologies such as SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Mobile Start, SAP S/4HANA Extension, SAP Adobe Forms, Integration and more. “The knowledge acquired played a pivotal role in delivering the best solution within the tight timeframe, ultimately leading to our success”, Syed says and adds: “I am grateful for the valuable resources provided by SAP, which significantly contributed to our achievements.” 

But Syed’s dedication to staying informed about the latest technologies and innovations does not only define his professional life as a Senior Product Specialist, where he strives to staying at the forefront of SAP advancements and contributing to the development and success of SAP Business Technology Platform. It has also long permeated into his private life as well, where the father of a 3-year-old daughter feels equally excited by cheering when he's in the kitchen. “I enjoy exploring new cuisines and trying out different recipes in my kitchen”, he says, stating that he is a Biryani expert who knows his way around the famous South Indian rice dish. It’s again a testament to his love for continuous learning.  

Broader skillset and industry recognition 

“Learning something new has always brought about significant positive changes in my life”, Syed says. “And acquiring knowledge and skills, particularly through platforms like the SAP Learning site, has enhanced my professional competence. It fostered a mindset of continuous improvement and problem-solving, enabling me to address challenges creatively. It has broadened my skillset and positively influenced various aspects of my professional life, including networking opportunities and industry recognition. In essence, continuous learning has played a pivotal role in my overall growth and success in the dynamic field of SAP technologies.”  

And for those who are still thinking about whether to make their appearance on a big stage and showcase their newfound skills, Syed has a clear message: “If I can do it – you can do it too.” 

Start your own success story   

Did you feel inspired by Syed’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Unlocking Success in the Cloud: SAP transitions to role-based and skill-driven Certifications
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

It’s no news that businesses are changing faster than ever before. With organizations becoming intelligent and future-proof, and the move to the cloud in full swing, we are seeing more and more job roles being transformed as well. The World Economic Forum predicts that more than 40% of skills and 1 billion jobs will change based on the introduction of new technologies by the end of the decade. 

Now more than ever, it’s crucial that upskilling and reskilling opportunities are readily available to help people and organizations continue to innovate and grow.  

For this reason, SAP is refocusing its certification portfolio on the jobs that we believe are most critical to enable successful Cloud adoption and S/4HANA Cloud transformation. We’re doing this in two ways.  

First, last year we introduced a role-based certification model that focuses on the full skill set required to perform a job instead of product functions.  

Second, this year we are introducing the “get and stay certified” model to better react to fast emerging and changing technologies and make upskilling easier for you. With this new approach, you will have access to all relevant updates for your role on products, skills, and new technologies with tailored, skill-based delta content. And you will be able to verify and keep your skills sharp with assessments attached to your SAP certification. We have also updated the validity period for certifications. Once you pass an assessment, your certification validity will be extended by 12 months from the assessment completion date.  

Our target is to empower our ecosystem to become – and remain – certified SAP experts, build a stronger workforce that can successfully and reliably deliver the critical projects our customers need. Our role-based certifications are designed to support you in identifying your next career step, choose your next learning goal or certification opportunity.

We know that being able to showcase your up-to-date skills is key to both your personal and your organization's success. And this is why we are thrilled about transforming the SAP Certification program!  

Stay tuned for more to come! And please share any feedback or questions you have. Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Learning Hub and SAP Product Training Updates and News with Jan Meyer
entry.content:
🎧 Listen to the entire Podcast on SAP Podcasts - Apple Podcast  -   Spotify .

In this episode we have Jan Meyer, Senior Vice President and Global Head of Learning Systems at SAP. Jan shares the evolution of SAP product learning over the years, he highlights the updates and latest news in SAP Learning Hub and looks into the future of SAP Product Learning.

SAP Training and its evolution over the last years 

SAP Product Learning has transformed from merely classroom-based to a blended, flexible to consume learning offering with different elements like digital self-paced, collaborative or instructor led learning.

Jan describes the different drivers like the emergence of cloud and SaaS software and thus the need to scale and speed up learning and skill-development. Jan notes that digital and virtual learning methods have a wider reach due to their flexibility and 24/7 availability, although traditional methods remain important. He cites examples of professionals causing problems in projects due to outdated product knowledge.

In  the beginning of 2024 there were different changes in SAP Learning Hub, the platform for digital SAP Training. 

SAP Learning Hub Updates 2024

The SAP Learning Hub 2024 is now offering an enhanced, optimized learning experience and a simplified, cost-optimized purchase. The goal is to scale learning and making learning for SAP software solutions more accessible to SAP customers and partners.
The new offerings include:

  • Two cost-effective subscription editions, one for customers and one for partners. In the past there were many editions and it was complex to find the right one. 
  • 180+ training systems with unlimited access. You can practice according to pre-defined exercises in your very own system which is an improvement to the past. (I know some customers use those systems beyond training, e.g. to evaluate software). 
  • 4.200+ live sessions in various languages and time zones held by SAP experts. This has been continuously expanded across solutions and is now only accessible via SAP Learning Hub. Live-sessions are a good enhancement to self-paced learning as it gives direct access to experts where you can ask questions. (I sometimes find it easier to have a date in my calendar than motivating and structuring myself to learn self-paced). 
  • Monitoring dashboards for learning analytics and learning management. Feedback on learning progress is important for individuals as well as on organizational level. This was previously available only to selected customers and now supports the management of learning and use of SAP Learning Hub as part of SAP transformations. 
  • 4 certification attempts are included in the subscription - while SAP Certification is undergoing a transformation towards a more role-based approach. 

This complements the proven elements like learning content in different languages, collaboration in learning rooms or the offers to stay current and certified with regular assessments and learning contents.

On learning.sap.com, a single place for SAP product learning content consisting of text, videos or self-assessments is now available for free. The content was redesigned for a digital-first experience. It is simple to access, simple to find and made modular and thus the free start. The SAP Learning Hub remains as SAP's premium learning offering with all the above mentioned elements.

Jan Meyer highlights also the decision to connect the learning site with the SAP Community for asynchronous collaborative learning. 

The goal is to make the learning experience more efficient, scalable, and personal.

Future Ideas for SAP Product Learning

In the third part of the podcast Jan Meyer shares his ideas on the future developments for SAP's learning experience. He emphasizes the importance of the primary destination for all SAP product learning. So for example openSAP is also in the process to migrate to the SAP Learning site. He also mentions the ongoing transformation of SAP's certification process to become more role-based, aligning with the real-life roles of learners in their ecosystem. Jan also highlights the potential of AI. A benefit for example lies in creating and translating more content, and this could help the learning organization do more and do it faster. Finally, he briefly mentions the bridge between learning and workforce management as a growing trend, and the use of AI to provide personalized learning journeys.

Jan also shares his narrative for learning and training. 

"We see clearly that learning adds significant business value through the entire customer value journey, from the buying phase to the implementation and adoption phase, and then through the consumption phase ..... So we clearly see that learning adds significant business value"

Find the entire talk in the EducationNewscast Podcast. 

Looking forward for any questions or comments. 

Shownotes

Jan Meyer on LinkedIn 
SAP Learning Hub on SAP.com  
SAP Learning Hub access   
SAPNewsbyte: SAP Offers Professionals New Digital Learning and Certification
Podcast: ENC283 – Artificial Intelligence at SAP Product Learning with Frank Wrubel 
Q&A Webinar (german language) at 5th of march: Whats new in SAP Learning Hub
Swedish online-radio

entry.title: How to Boost Your Career with SAP’s New Learning and Certification Offerings
entry.content:
It's no secret that the need for skilled IT professionals is skyrocketing, with the U.S. Department of Labor alone predicting a substantial 23% increase by 2031. To help you keep up with the pace of innovations, and boost your career, SAP launched a new guided, premium learning offering and announced an enhanced certification program.  

Sounds exciting? It is! So here is what you need to know to get started on your next learning adventure – and career advancement: 

You can pursue role-based certifications to get a more sustainable skillset 

The tech industry is transforming at a blistering pace and specialized cloud skills are very much in demand to support business transformation. Recognizing this need for always-up-to-date skills, SAP is transitioning to a role-based certification model and making continuous assessments a priority. A handful of role-based certifications are already available, the latest one for SAP S/4HANA Cloud implementations consultations was just recently launched. This new certification will focus on key skills that are applicable to multiple cloud solutions from SAP and can help your career through superior role-based competencies. Learn more in this blog post from my colleague Dieter.  

“The pace of change and the talent shortage call for a new approach to identifying future-focused skills and roles. Instead of focusing on traditional aspects like degrees, job histories and titles, professional competencies become more important,” says Andre Bechtold, senior vice president and head of solution and innovation experience at SAP. “By transitioning to role-based certifications that focus on core skills and competencies, the skillset of a learner becomes more valuable and gains sustainability and more relevance for longer periods of time.”  

To learn more about the new approach, turn to this blog post from my colleague and expert Raja.  

You can benefit from a new premium learning offering to reach your goals faster 

It might have a familiar name, but the enhanced SAP Learning Hub is our next level guided, premium learning offering. Available since January, the redesigned SAP Learning Hub provides everything anyone needs to learn, innovate, and achieve more with SAP software. 

A subscription to SAP Learning Hub provides access to a vast number of guided learning resources and management capabilities, such as: 
 

  • Expert-led live sessions covering deep dives and preparations to stay certified  
  • Access to hands-on practice systems and sandboxed SAP environments prefilled with data and exercises to experiment with solutions 
  • Four SAP Certification exam attempts per year and access to enablement and assessment to keep certifications valid 
  • Learning analytics and management capabilities 

With seamless access to both self-paced and guided learning resources, learners can follow learning journeys tailored for specific roles and skill levels to upskill in SAP solutions and topics in a self-paced way. With access to guided learning resources and certifications, the redesigned SAP Learning Hub everyone to become and remain certified. 

Available with two editions, anyone can subscribe to SAP Learning Hub on the SAP Store, or to SAP Learning Hub, partner edition (available for SAP PartnerEdge members) on the SAP Partner Portal.

As a learner with an SAP partner, you can get an exclusive experience on top 

Acknowledging the challenges and embracing the power of SAP’s partner ecosystem, SAP has also launched an enhanced partner experience on the SAP Learning site specifically tailored to the needs of partner learners. This new experience features curated SAP Learning Journeys, exclusive access to events and subject matter experts, plus the opportunity to earn valuable credentials. 

Whether you're opting for a role-based certification, a deep dive into the enhanced SAP Learning Hub, or all the above mentioned cool new offerings, you can start the future of learning right now – an investment in your SAP education today could provide a significant return for your future career. So, what’s stopping you now? Start learning anytime, anywhere. Secure your future by growing your skills with SAP!

entry.title: Prepare flexibly for certification as an SAP S/4HANA consultant
entry.content:
If you enjoy independent learning at your own pace but also want to have face-to-face contact with instructors and fellow learners, then the SAP Blended Learning Academy is for you.
This while-you-work program combines the advantages of various learning methods and allows you to prepare for certification as an SAP S/4HANA consultant. 

The next opportunity to become a certified SAP S/4HANA consultant starts on April 22, 2024:

SAP S/4HANA Consultant Academy – become an SAP S/4HANA Associate Consultant in five months:

  • WS4HFI Financial Accounting in SAP S/4HANA (FI)
  • WS4HCO Management Accounting in SAP S/4HANA (CO)
  • WS4HPP Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA (PP)
  • WS4HMM Procurement in SAP S/4HANA (MM)
  • WS4HSD Sales in SAP S/4HANA (SD)

SAP S/4HANA Integration Academy – become an SAP S/4HANA Integration Consultant in two months:

  • WS4INT Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA

With the blended learning approach, you can enjoy all the benefits of the different learning methods and prepare flexibly for certification as an SAP S/4HANA consultant.

entry.title: Learning Her Way Up: The Inspiring Growth Story of Anu in Norway
entry.content:
Roughly 4300 miles and 5 time zones away from home, Anu’s life suddenly turned into something very different. “In 2012, my husband got a job in Norway, so we moved here from India and started settling into our new life”, the 36-year-old recounts. “And my life has changed a lot”, she emphasizes. “I had no friends when I came here, I didn’t know any Norwegian.” But she soon realized that she would need to learn the language to get a job and truly connect with people. “Learning Norwegian was important for me to fit in, so I went to a local school to learn the basics.” Her perseverance paid off quickly - within one year, she was fluent enough to apply for jobs and secure a new position. 

And passed her SAP Certification exam after 4 weeks of studying, posted her badge on LinkedIn, and got immediately recognized by her manager.However, Anu felt like she was missing something. “I've had a job, but I've felt like my career wasn't moving forward”, she explains. “It wasn't because I wasn't working hard. It was because I had a lot of family responsibilities. Living in a different country, taking care of two young kids, and working full-time made things busy.” And then she realized: “My colleagues and even my spouse were focused on growing their careers – but I wasn’t.” That’s when Anu decided to act and immediately found the right path thanks to LinkedIn.

“It made me see how important it is to stay updated” 

In fact, it was one post from SAP Developer Advocat Thomas Jung that caught her eye. He was promoting SAP’s digital skills initiative, where people from underrepresented groups in tech can benefit from free digital learning and apply for a free certification exam voucher for an official SAP Certification. Since Anu started working with SAP solutions back in 2008 while she was getting her master's degree in software engineering, she already had SAP experience and thought this was the right path to follow.  

“When I was getting ready for certification, I found out about many new topics that I didn't deal with in my regular work. It made me see how important it is to stay updated, especially in a time when technology is growing really fast”, Anu recounts. “When we work on projects, we usually concentrate on one particular area. But it's always good to have an idea about what's going on around us.” Knowing about Anu’s perseverance, it comes as no surprise that she made use of every second she had to study for her exam – on the train or while the kids were asleep. And after 4 weeks of diving deep into the world of ABAP programming, she passed the exam on her first try. “It was the first thing I told my husband that day – I was really proud.” So proud even, that she immediately uploaded her certification badge to LinkedIn, where her manager saw her credentials and reacted himself.

Certification resulted in increased confidence in skills 

“Since obtaining the certification, I have seen positive changes in my professional journey”, Anu says. She believes that both her employer and customers have gained increased confidence in her abilities. “The knowledge and skills acquired through the program have proven invaluable in my day-to-day tasks. The certification has not only enhanced my proficiency in ABAP programming but has also opened doors to new opportunities within my current role.” 

It’s Anu’s understanding to always learn new things. “I want to teach my kids these values through my actions”, she explains. And again, it doesn’t come as a surprise that she already has a next goal in mind: “I want to complete the certification in ABAP cloud programming, and I have already started my preparations for the exam.” 

Start your own success story    

Did you feel inspired by Anu’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Blog: Unlock New Opportunities – SAP's Industry Cloud Partner Certification
entry.content:
By Christian Hahn

In today's dynamic technology world, staying ahead of the curve is essential for businesses to thrive. SAP, a global leader in enterprise software solutions, is also a leader in enterprise innovation. With that in mind, we are introducing an exciting new offering for Industry Cloud partners to earn the designation “SAP-certified integration with GROW with SAP for their Industry Cloud applications built as SAP Business Technology Platform extensions.

This certification opens a world of possibilities for partners looking to demonstrate the technical integration and compatibility of their Industry Cloud applications with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
 

Discover the Path to Certification.
 

This partner service offering is an optional, yet highly valuable program designed to ensure that Industry Cloud applications and solutions listed on the SAP Store are seamlessly integrated and fully compatible with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The certification process is rigorous and thorough, involving comprehensive testing and evaluation of the partner's solution to ensure it meets SAP's high standards of technical integration. You will be working with a dedicated SAP integration consultant throughout the process.  

Enjoy the benefits of providing a certified Industry Cloud partner solution, including:

  • Credibility and Trust: Achieving certification for your Industry Cloud solution is a powerful testament to a partner's commitment to quality and technical excellence. It instills trust in customers and prospects, assuring them that the certified solution is not only compatible but also optimized for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and following SAP best practices.
  • Market Visibility: SAP Store is a globally recognized marketplace for SAP solutions. With a certified solution, partners gain increased visibility, attracting potential customers looking for reliable and integrated Industry Cloud applications.
  • Competitive Advantage: Certification sets partners apart in a competitive market. It demonstrates a deep understanding of SAP technologies and a dedication to delivering exceptional solutions.
  • Access to SAP Ecosystem: Certified partners gain access to SAP's vast ecosystem of resources, support, and collaboration opportunities, opening doors to new growth avenues.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Certified solutions are more likely to meet customer expectations, leading to higher satisfaction rates, reduced support requests, and enhanced customer retention.
     

Sign up now.

Take advantage of this opportunity and sign up directly via the Partner Benefits Catalog, if your solution is an industry cloud extension built on SAP Business Technology Platform and integrated with SAP S/4HANA public edition.

You can also find additional information in our FAQ document and by visiting SAP's Integration and Certification Center. Please contact icc@sap.com with any questions you may have.

entry.title: Register now: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies
entry.content:
• In Jan 2024, SAP Learning has introduced new changes to SAP Learning Journeys, SAP Certification Exams and the Stay Current cycle.  To support our partner ecosystem, with these new changes for aspiring and existing consultants with Certifications, we have launched a new edition of SAP Partner Certification Academies for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.
  • The SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies is meant for aspiring LOB functional consultants and project managers, that are looking to get certified on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Role Based & LoB Certifications.
  • The academies provide expert guidance, allowing learners to build familiarity & understand certification guidance across various topics, covered in the SAP Learning Journeys, which reduces the time spent in the self-paced consumption of LJs.  The Academies provide learners, an overview of key concepts, tips & tricks to optimally consume the SAP Learning Journeys while preparing them for their SAP Certification exam.

Benefits of this Program:

  • Our offering improves your chances of passing the SAP Certification Exam.
  • Our offering enhances and accelerates your learning path in effectively progressing through an SAP Learning Journey to prepare for an SAP Certification Exam.
  • Key Points:
  • Participation in the Certification Academies are free of charge, as always. Certification hub subscriptions and LH subscriptions, however remain, the responsibility of the individual consultant/ partner.
  • The Academies are based on the new version of Learning Journeys and Certification Exams released as of Jan 24, 2024. This is every partner’s best opportunity, to not lose any time and get started on their Certification efforts.
  • The Academies run in both EMEA / APJ and NA/ EMEA time zones, therefore we should encourage all-round participation from our partners.  

Target: Audience

 

  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to UPSKILL to (or) REFRESH their SAP S/4HANA Cloud LoB fundamentals.
  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to get SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Cloud) Certified.

Fee
This is a free of charge offering. However, it is mandatory that the Partner has access to a full subscription of SAP Learning Hub, to access all the content of the SAP Learning Journeys for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Date of the Academies:

  • 11th March 2024 to 14th March 2024.

Registration Link: 

  • Link to Register  

Please reach out to sapna.subramaniam@sap.com in case of any questions on this offering!

I welcome your questions and looking forward to having you participate in our Academies.

entry.title: Inetum valora las certificaciones SAP para reforzar su compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación
entry.content:
SAP ha tenido la oportunidad de entrevistar a Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum. Inetum es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas para impulsar la transformación digital. En la entrevista, Inetum esboza su camino hacia la adquisición de certificaciones SAP, discutiendo la importancia estratégica y los beneficios de las certificaciones. Inetum también describe cómo cubren todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y tienen clientes en todos los segmentos de mercado.

Por favor comience describiendo su empresa y los servicios que ofrece.

INETUM es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas, dedicada a impulsar la digitalización de empresas y organizaciones en los 27 países en los que opera. Con un enfoque centrado en el cliente, ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios que abarcan desde la consultoría y el desarrollo de software hasta servicios de infraestructura y gestión de datos.

En la actualidad, la compañía cuenta con más de 28.000 empleados, una facturación global de 2.400 millones de euros y 2.700 consultores SAP, lo que nos convierte en uno de los grandes players en esta tecnología.

En este ámbito en concreto, cubrimos todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y contamos con clientes en prácticamente todos los sectores y segmentos de mercado, siendo nuestras principales fortalezas el foco en la calidad, nuestra amplia experiencia en soluciones cloud y nuestro conocimiento de ciertos sectores y áreas funcionales, como Retail&CPG, Sector Público o Recursos Humanos.

Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum

 

¿Por qué decidieron inicialmente (en 2008) obtener una certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner?

En 2008, decidimos obtener la certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner con el objetivo de fortalecer nuestra posición como proveedores de servicios SAP de confianza. Esta certificación, a la que más tarde se unieron otras en outsourcing, ha consolidado nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en la prestación de servicios.

Contamos con certificaciones especializadas en Cloud and Infrastructure Operations, Hosting Operations, SAP BTP Operations, Business Suite Solutions Operations, SAP HANA Operations, SAP S/4HANA Solutions Operations y SuccessFactors Solutions Operations.

Asimismo, hemos adquirido competencias avanzadas en diversos campos, como Human Capital Management, con especializaciones en Compensation and Commission, Core HR and Payroll, Learning, Talent Management, Analytics and Planning, Application Development and Integration, Database and Data Management.

También hemos obtenido certificaciones en SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) con especialización en Commerce, Customer Data Platform, Marketing, Sales, and Service, así como en Spend Management y Supply Chain Management.

Adicionalmente, nos enorgullece destacar que somos Partner Center of Expertise, lo que nos capacita para la venta de licencias SAP y su mantenimiento. Estas certificaciones y competencias adicionales refuerzan nuestra posición como líderes en el sector y demuestran nuestro compromiso continuo con la calidad y la innovación en la entrega de soluciones SAP.

Como hemos visto, desde la primera certificación han expandido el alcance de las certificaciones, es decir no solo han ido recertificando, sino que han añadido certificaciones adicionales. ¿Cuál ha sido la razón?

El objetivo de ampliar nuestras certificaciones SAP está enmarcado dentro de nuestra búsqueda constante de la excelencia y de la mejora continua. A medida que evolucionan el panorama tecnológico y las necesidades de nuestros clientes, hemos considerado esencial ampliar nuestras certificaciones para aportar un mayor valor a nuestros clientes.

La consecución de nuevas certificaciones no solo refleja nuestro compromiso con la actualización y la especialización en las últimas tecnologías y estándares SAP, sino que también nos permite acompañar a los clientes en una variedad más amplia de servicios y desafíos empresariales.

Al contar con un mayor abanico de certificaciones, estamos mejor preparados para ofrecer servicios más integrales y adaptados a las necesidades específicas de los diferentes sectores y líneas de negocio.

Recientemente han obtenido la certificación SAP BTP Operations. ¿Cuál fue el factor decisivo para optar a esta certificación? ¿Qué beneficios han obtenido con ello?

La decisión de obtener la certificación de SAP BTP Operations fue motivada por nuestro compromiso con la innovación en las tecnologías emergentes y nuestra aspiración de ofrecer servicios líderes en el sector. Un compromiso que viene desde 2017 con la creación del Centro de Excelencia Cloud, a través del cual, hemos centralizado actividades que incluyen análisis, prototipado, creación de soluciones personalizadas en SAP BTP y la implementación y soporte de proyectos en soluciones cloud, asegurando cobertura global y eficacia continua en este ámbito.

Por tanto, elegir esta certificación se fundamentó en el reconocimiento de que SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) representa un avance significativo en la manera en que las empresas manejan y aprovechan sus datos y procesos comerciales.

De modo que el factor decisivo para buscar esta certificación radica en nuestra determinación de ofrecer soluciones integrales que aprovechen al máximo las capacidades de esta plataforma. Con ella, estamos capacitados para proporcionar servicios especializados en operaciones dentro del entorno SAP BTP, lo que se traduce en una gestión más eficiente, mayor flexibilidad y un mejor aprovechamiento de las innovaciones tecnológicas para nuestros clientes.

Los beneficios asociados con esta certificación incluyen una mayor competencia para abordar proyectos complejos, acceso a recursos exclusivos e informaciones de primera mano, y la capacidad de proporcionar servicios más personalizados y adaptados a las necesidades específicas del mercado en el entorno SAP BTP.

¿En qué medida el mercado valora que cuentan con estas certificaciones?

El mercado valora positivamente que contemos con certificaciones en una amplia gama de áreas, desde operaciones de outsourcing hasta soluciones específicas como SAP BTP Operations. Estas certificaciones no solo respaldan nuestra capacidad para abordar proyectos complejos, sino que también indican nuestra disposición para adaptarnos a las últimas tendencias tecnológicas y responder a las necesidades cambiantes del mercado.

Por otro lado, las certificaciones SAP ofrecen beneficios integrales a nuestra empresa, fortaleciendo la credibilidad y confianza del cliente, resaltando nuestros puntos fuertes.

Además, ser un Partner Center of Expertise y contar con certificaciones en licenciamiento SAP refuerza nuestra posición como un proveedor confiable y autorizado. Esto no solo es crucial para la confianza de los clientes, sino que también puede influir en las decisiones de compra, ya que las organizaciones buscan socios que no solo ofrezcan soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas, sino que también estén respaldadas por las certificaciones y competencias necesarias.

¿Qué beneficios ven en las certificaciones de SAP?

Las certificaciones de SAP ofrecen una serie de beneficios significativos que impactan positivamente en diversas áreas de nuestras operaciones.

Por ejemplo, durante las auditorías, las certificaciones proporcionan una validación objetiva de nuestro cumplimiento con los estándares y prácticas recomendadas, asegurando la calidad y eficiencia de nuestros servicios. Las recomendaciones resultantes de estas auditorías nos brindan oportunidades para mejorar continuamente, afinar nuestras operaciones y mantenernos al día con las últimas mejores prácticas del sector.

Más allá de validar nuestro cumplimiento con estándares y prácticas recomendadas durante auditorías, estas certificaciones contribuyen al desarrollo y retención del talento, mejoran la eficiencia operativa y nos permiten alinearnos de manera más efectiva con las estrategias empresariales de nuestros clientes.

En última instancia, estas credenciales son un activo estratégico que respalda nuestro compromiso con la excelencia, la innovación y el éxito a largo plazo en un entorno digital dinámico.

entry.title: Beating the Odds: How SAP Skills Shaped Luca’s Career Despite a Struggling Economy
entry.content:
Luca loves a good challenge, whether it’s reaching the next level in his favourite video game, finishing a heavy book, or learning a new skill. “I try to challenge myself whenever possible, to try something new or do something in a different way,” the 30-year-old from Buenos Aires explains. “And sometimes I learn a little bit about myself. And that’s always a pleasure.” However, the circumstances in which he does this are not always the easiest: According to the national statistics authority, the inflation rate in Argentina rose to more than 200 percent last year. With gross domestic product fallen by 2.5 percent last year, and the peso fallen to a record low against the US dollar, the economic prospects in his home country of Argentina look bleak – once again in just a few years. 

Job market for SAP skills is growing 

Thankfully, Luca loves a good challenge. So, when he hit a roadblock with his first job in an office – he completed administrative tasks, “nothing a manager would do”, he says – he decided to do something about it. “There was not much space to grow, so I searched the internet for new job opportunities.” He wanted to combine both of his passions: Interacting with people and leveraging technology. And Human Resources could give him that.

Luca loves the interactive approach of SAP's learning journeys.“As I searched the web for new job opportunities, I found many positions required SAP skills. I did not know anything about SAP at that time, but realized the job market for SAP solutions is growing, so I searched the term online,” he explains. “I found a vast library of information, an online academy, fellow students asking questions, and teachers having fun teaching on many platforms. It was fascinating.” He wanted to become part of that world, part of that community. And he wanted to break into the world of SAP’s HXM. But how could he get started? 

SAP Certification as “a big plus” for his CV 

That’s when Luca came across the digital skills initiative, where SAP gives away 10,000 free certification vouchers and free online learning resources to help people upskill and pivot into tech jobs with an official and in-demand skill validation. He immediately got started. “The learning journeys on the SAP Learning site helped a great deal; their interactive approach is way more manageable and fun than just reading a document,” he says. He claimed his certification voucher shortly after, took the exam, and got his first SAP Certification as an SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM with ERP 6.0 EHP7. And that’s when his starting position suddenly improved. 

“Let me put it this way,” Luca explains, “from the moment I got my certification, I began to apply for relevant positions. I wanted to show that I had the skills they were looking for and if not, I had the capacity to learn them. Two months later I was hired for an entry-level position as a Trainee Functional Consultant.” Luca believes the certification was the most important factor and added a big plus to his CV. “SAP Certification makes a difference. Learning SAP skills and getting certified opens new doors for you.” And since he likes challenges, Luca has already identified his next goal, of course: Getting certified in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core and Payroll.   

Start your own success story     

Did you feel inspired by Luca’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Celebrate Female Empowerment This International Women’s Day
entry.content:
This year, we are proud to invite you to join a very special International Women’s Day celebration on March 8 – a virtual live event in our beloved SAP Community! Get ready to learn about SAP and how to start a career in tech, and hear from familiar faces. Our SAP Learning Insights podcast host David Chaviano and his guests will help you understand SAP and its ecosystem, share inspiring career profiles and stories, and open up the stage for you to ask questions, get engaged, and network.

Join us on March 8 as we honor the remarkable achievements of SAP women worldwide, share empowering stories, and discuss meaningful initiatives that could push forward our collective journey towards equality. And to give you a sneak peek of our guest speakers, why don’t you head over to this blog post and learn more about Lin Fan, a young Chinese woman who faced sexism in her old job and turned her life around as an SAP Consultant with the help of SAP’s digital skills initiative? And if you’re interersted in ABAP development, check out Sandra’s inspiring story in the SAP ecosystem. We’re very much looking forward to have these amazing role models join our event as guest speakers!

And if all of this wasn’t enough positive excitement already, you will get the chance to ask questions, engage in discussions, and network with likeminded fellows. Plus, our speakers will also share valuable tips and tricks to boost your career, point you towards some great resources to get started, and help you understand SAP, its ecosystem, and key roles better.

Joining our event is easy! Simply let us know you’re coming by RSVPing to the event. On the event page, you will also find the link, meeting ID, and passcode to join the Zoom call.

Event at a glance:

International Women’s Day Intro to SAP and your Future Career

Mar 8, 2024 3:30 PM - 8 PM GMT

Event URL: https://sap-se.zoom.us/j/94016816749?pwd=ODNtMm9qa05jN21tZEh2WTVONGxQUT09
Meeting ID: 940 1681 6749 
Passcode: SAPcareer

Let’s bring International Women’s Day to life and benefit from an exciting, engaging, and inspiring way to learn more about SAP, it’s ecosystem and key roles. Your next career boost is just around the corner, so join the conversation and meet some new people along the way!

We are looking forward to seeing you!

entry.title: Unveiling the Future: The first role-based certification for SAP Analytics Cloud is live!
entry.content:
In the dynamic world of data and analytics, staying ahead of the curve is not just an advantage – it's a necessity. Enter the SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud, the first role-based certification in the analytics area that promises to set you up for career success. 

Embrace the Power of SAP Analytics Cloud 

Picture this – a comprehensive certification that covers the entire spectrum of a data analyst's role within SAP Analytics Cloud. From planning and modeling to story design, predictive analytics, and administration – this certification is designed to empower you with the skills needed to navigate the intricate landscape of SAP Analytics Cloud.  

What Sets This Certification Apart? 

This certification isn't just about passing an exam on a solution; it's about mastering a full spectrum of tools and techniques that make you a well-rounded SAP Analytics Cloud expert. The comprehensive curriculum ensures that you not only understand the theoretical aspects but also gain practical insights that can be applied in real-world scenarios. 

Your Journey Through SAP Analytics Cloud 

Dive deep into planning strategies, master the art of modeling, craft compelling data stories, explore the world of predictive analytics, and understand the administrative aspects – this certification leaves no stone unturned.  

Get started by learning the basics with these free Learning Journeys to prepare for the certification: 

Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud  

Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud 

Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning  

Stand out and Begin Your Analytics Journey! 

The future of data analytics is here, and it starts with you. Visit the certification page to explore resources, understand the exam structure, and embark on a journey toward becoming a certified SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyst. Seize the opportunity, and let your analytics journey begin! 

Are you already certified in SAP Analytics Cloud and want to see what changes are coming for you? Just visit the certification transformation page.

Your future in analytics awaits – are you ready to embrace it?

entry.title: Empowering Dreams Through Digital Skills: A Glimpse Into Karla's Tech Journey with SAP
entry.content:
As a child, Karla would secretly venture into the computer room of her school to follow her curiosity. She simply wanted to explore the computer and learn how it works, the 34-year-old from Portugal explains. “I have always nurtured the dream of working in the field of computer science.” And when she finally saw an opportunity to do so, she couldn’t let it pass. And that opportunity was SAP’s digital skills initiative, where SAP sponsors 10,000 free vouchers to get certified in SAP solutions.  

“When we do what we love, it’s not work, it’s fun!” 

Of course, Karla still remembers the time she first encountered SAP. It was May 2022, and she was still finishing her postgrad studies in software development, when she joined an SAP ABAP Academy with her current employer Softinsa, a Lisbon-based company specialized in management services and application and development. “It was at that moment that I discovered exactly my professional passion.” Karla was hired as an SAP consultant for SAP Fiori and couldn’t be happier about it: “I don't call it work. When we do what we love, it's not work, it's fun!” And fun for her is working with people, serving people, she says. “Life is about how positively we impact wherever we go, how much we help others. That is what is important!” 

Never gave up on her dream: Karla Lima from Portugal.However, to reach her goals, Karla knew that she had to invest in her training. “I realized that investing in my career in this area was crucial. Even coming from a humble background, I never gave up on my dream.” Her wish to continuously evolve and develop, paired with her curiosity helped her a lot in advancing, Karla explains. And this was when she came across the opportunity she couldn’t let pass: SAP’s digital skills initiative. “I enrolled and started learning for free on the SAP Learning site and achieved the certification I aimed for.” In fact, Karla is the only digital skills candidate from Portugal who achieved a certification.  

Digital skills initiative helped her triumph 

But what sounds so simple doesn’t always of course have to be simple. “Learning something new is challenging, uncomfortable because we step out of our comfort zone,” Karla knows. “There are always difficulties, but after each step, seeing each application being built, step by step, it is extremely satisfying and pleasurable to see everything working, rewarding.” And when Karla means rewarding, she knows what she’s talking about.  

The change she saw in upskilling and getting certified via the digital skills initiative was significant, she says. “I could have given up in the face of all difficulties, but I chose to triumph. Overcoming obstacles, I achieved not only recognition in my work but also from clients. Today, I can serve them with excellence and total confidence. I believe all the efforts were worthwhile, and recognition is what makes us believe that. I love what I do!” 

Start your own success story or hire go-getters like Karla 

Did you feel inspired by Karla’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories! 

Are you looking to hire people like Karla? Reach out to the digital skills initiative for information on how to get in contact with her and other people like her who are entering the SAP ecosystem with a fresh cloud-first mindset. We are happy to connect any partner or customer with our candidates to provide a mutual growth opportunity for new talent and the organizations supporting our ecosystem.

entry.title: Recently SAP ICC certified? Learn how to leverage your certification benefits effectively:
entry.content:
In today's ever-evolving business landscape, to stand out from the crowd is essential. With competition intensifying and customer expectations soaring, businesses need more than just innovative solutions; they need credibility, visibility, and trust. With SAP Certification – a prestigious endorsement, will opens doors to a world of opportunities. Let's now explore how partners can harness the full potential of SAP Certification to propel their businesses to new heights. 

1. SAP Certificate and Test Report: 

Achieving SAP Certification isn't merely about crossing a milestone; it's about earning a badge of excellence. Upon successful completion of the certification process, partners will receive an official SAP Certificate and a comprehensive Test Report. These documents serve as tangible proof of compliance with SAP's rigorous standards and specifications. The SAP Certificate is a testament to a partner's commitment to quality and innovation, while the Test Report provides detailed insights into the solution's functionalities and technical performance. Partners are encouraged to leverage these assets to enhance credibility, instill confidence, and differentiate themselves in the market. 

2. SAP Certified Logo: 

The SAP Certified Logo is more than just a symbol; it's a beacon of trust and reliability. Endorsed by one of the world's leading software solution providers, this logo carries immense weight and prestige. Upon certification completion, partners are granted the privilege of displaying the SAP Certified Logo across various marketing materials and channels. Whether it's adorning the company website, featuring in promotional materials, or gracing social media profiles, the SAP Certified Logo serves as a powerful endorsement of the solution's quality and integrity. By prominently showcasing this logo, partners can reinforce their alignment with industry-leading standards and instill confidence in customers and prospects alike.

3. SAP Certified Solutions Directory and SAP Store: 

Visibility is crucial in today's crowded marketplace. Fortunately, SAP offers partners two invaluable platforms for increasing exposure and attracting potential customers: the SAP Certified Solutions Directory (CSD) and the SAP Store. By publishing their certified solutions in these platforms, partners gain access to a vast network of customers actively seeking innovative solutions to their business challenges. The CSD serves as a centralized hub for partners to showcase their certified solutions, personalize their entries, and provide links to official SAP resources, thereby reinforcing their credibility and authenticity. Similarly, the SAP Store acts as a virtual showroom where customers can browse, compare, and purchase certified solutions with confidence. With personalized listings and special subcategory placements, partners can significantly enhance their visibility and appeal to prospective customers. 

4. SAP ICC Partner Meetups: 

Connection and collaboration are at the heart of SAP's partner ecosystem. Through SAP ICC Partner Meetups and Partner Day Events, certified partners have the opportunity to connect, collaborate, and stay informed about the latest developments in SAP technology and solutions. These events provide a platform for partners to network with peers, share insights and best practices, and gain valuable insights into emerging trends and opportunities. As a certified partner, you enjoy priority access to relevant SAP products and technical updates, enabling them to stay ahead of the curve and drive innovation within their organizations. With events held in various regions and time zones – both in-person and virtually – participation is convenient and accessible for partners worldwide.

5. Success Stories and Press Release: 

Every success story deserves to be shared, celebrated, and amplified. Through SAP's press release and success story initiatives, partners have the opportunity to showcase their achievements, highlight their impact, and inspire others within the SAP ecosystem. Whether it's a groundbreaking implementation, a transformative solution, or a game-changing partnership, every milestone is worthy of recognition. SAP ICC provides partners with Press Release templates to ensure their certification success reach a wide audience across multiple channels. By sharing their success stories, partners not only enhance their visibility and reputation but also contribute to the collective success and growth of the entire SAP community. 

6. Enhancing your Marketing impact: 

In today's digital landscape, mastering key wording for SEO, leveraging video/written testimonials, and engaging with social media are crucial components of a successful marketing strategy, especially for SAP-certified partners. When optimizing content for search engines, it's essential to go beyond mere keyword stuffing and adopt a balanced approach that incorporates both exact-match keywords and Latent Semantic Indexing (LSI) keywords. By understanding the specific keywords their target audience is searching for, partners can enhance their content's visibility and attract potential customers actively seeking certified solutions. Additionally, showcasing real-life experiences and success stories through customer testimonials, whether in written or video form, helps build trust and credibility. Highlighting the benefits of SAP certification, such as shortened implementation times and cost savings, resonates with prospects and sets partners apart as trusted industry leaders. Furthermore, strategic social media engagement allows partners to amplify their marketing efforts, reach a wider audience, and drive traffic to their websites. Consistency, authenticity, and strategic planning are key to success on social media, as partners share newly created content, testimonials, blogs, and press releases across various channels. By updating social media bios, cover photos, and links to reflect their recent certification with SAP ICC, partners can enhance their credibility and visibility in the digital realm, ultimately maximizing the ROI of their SAP certification. 

For more information on SAP Certification and how it can benefit your business, reach out to: icc-info@sap.com 

© 2024 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company. All rights reserved. See Legal Notice on www.sap.com/legal-notice for use terms, disclaimers, disclosures, or restrictions related to SAP Materials for general audiences.
